emails.subject: Re: Western Area Power Admin -- Upper Great Plains
emails.subject_base: Western Area Power Admin -- Upper Great Plains
emails.body: Just an heads up, they are open to trade physical power, which I expect is what they want to trade, but not financial. Mary Griff Gray 08/07/2000 09:00 AM

emails.subject: Re: Western Area Power Admin -- Upper Great Plains

emails.subject: Re: Western Area Power Admin -- Upper Great Plains
emails.subject_base: Western Area Power Admin -- Upper Great Plains
emails.body: Great thanks. If they want to do financial, would that be possible? From: Tana Jones on 08/07/2000 09:05 AM

emails.subject: Re: Western Area Power Admin -- Upper Great Plains
emails.subject_base: Western Area Power Admin -- Upper Great Plains
emails.body: Great thanks. If they want to do financial, would that be possible? From: Tana Jones on 08/07/2000 09:05 AM

emails.subject: Re: Western Area Power Admin -- Upper Great Plains
emails.subject_base: Western Area Power Admin -- Upper Great Plains
emails.body: Because they are a governmental entity, in order to do financial our lawyers would need to talk to them about their authorizing statutes, legislative authority and possible legal opinions before they can trade financial. So if they want to trade financial, get me a name and phone number, probably of one of their lawyers and we'll have to talk to them. Mary Griff Gray 08/07/2000 09:33 AM

emails.body: Thanks for the info now I'm going to start praying that they don't request financial ability. From: Tana Jones on 08/07/2000 10:02 AM
